title: Tsuma: Bakuretsu
description: Add Megumin's mob to your game so you don't feel alone
body:
This mob adds Megumin to your game, it's like a taamgochi, you have to feed and talk to her sometimes, the mod has no real consequences for you not doing this, but ethically speaking, you have to feed her.

Well, if you downloaded the mod and don't know how to "summon" Megumin, just click with a TNT on a cat, it will start floating and Megumin will appear, well, thanks for downloading the mod, have fun <3

(if you want to make a translation addon, or other things, I really appreciate it. <3)
